title: cartiera howellii
intro: Cartiera howellii, also known as the Carapa howellii or Howell's Carapa, is a plant species that belongs to the family Meliaceae. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its seeds, which contain a high concentration of carapic acid, a compound with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. Cartiera howellii has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and capsules, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
